name: meeting-superlab
description: A step-by-step product-design SOP workflow for Tencent Meeting teams: ask questions before answering vague needs, define the problem, research competitors, diverge creatively, converge with tradeoffs, offer low-fidelity prototype/Figma/Open Design output, apply Tencent Meeting Apple-like mobile design guidance, improve visual polish, check PRDs, and run multi-perspective reviews.

interface.shortDescription: AI workflows for Tencent Meeting product and design exploration
interface.longDescription: Meeting Superlab helps product managers and designers turn rough meeting-product needs into a disciplined AI-assisted SOP: Step 1 problem definition, Step 2 competitor research, Step 3 creative divergence, Step 4 tradeoff-based convergence, Step 5 low-fidelity prototype/Figma/Open Design handoff, Tencent Meeting Apple-like mobile design-system guidance, visual polish, structured design review, and Step 6 PRD AI Check. It starts by asking targeted clarification questions for vague needs, presents 2-3 options with pros and cons at decision points, proactively offers low-fidelity prototype, mobile artifact prompt, or Figma output when a direction is ready, improves generated UI through a product-grade visual polish pass, and keeps product judgment in the loop instead of letting AI jump straight to final answers.
defaultPrompt: Use Meeting Superlab. Do not directly give the final answer; first ask clarifying questions if my need is vague.
Use Meeting Superlab to explore this meeting product need step by step, then offer low-fidelity prototype or Figma output when ready.
Use Meeting Superlab to create a Tencent Meeting Apple-like mobile prototype prompt for Open Design or Figma.
Use the Tencent Meeting mobile design system to audit this mobile screen and make it feel closer to Apple's product language.
Use Meeting Superlab to improve the visual quality of this generated interface.
Use the six-step product design SOP to move from problem definition to PRD check.
